svg.text: Flock Safety's license-plate cameras are already recording NC
drivers block by block — no warrant, no notice. Help us rein
Every plate, every car, every trip —
logged into a shareable database, kept
for up to 90 days, no court order required.
Check the camera map, message your
officials, and find your local effort at
Scan to find cameras near you and
DeFlock NC is an independent, volunteer-run advocacy campaign. Not affiliated with Flock Safety, Inc.
Peaceful, lawful advocacy only — we never condone tampering with cameras or property.
